allow: PowerShell($k = Get-Command keytool -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($k\) { "keytool 발견: $\($k.Source\)" } else { "PATH에 keytool 없음" }; "--- Flutter가 쓰는 JDK ---"; $j = \(flutter doctor -v 2>$null | Select-String "Java binary at:"\); if \($j\) { $j.Line.Trim\(\) } else { "flutter doctor에서 Java 경로 못 찾음" })

PowerShell($bt = Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\build-tools" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; if \($bt\) { $aps = Join-Path $bt.FullName "apksigner.bat"; "apksigner: $aps"; & $aps verify --print-certs "C:\\src\\project\\sekkeul\\build\\app\\outputs\\flutter-apk\\app-release.apk" 2>&1 | Select-String "CN=|Signer" | Select-Object -First 4 } else { "build-tools 못 찾음" })
PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(Test-Path $adb\) { & $adb devices } else { \(Get-Command adb -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; adb devices })
